info.title: System API V2
info.description: Workspace ONE UEM System REST API V2

post.summary: New - Creates a new admin user.
post.description: Performs necessary checks and Create a new Admin.

parameters.name: admin
parameters.description: The admin user resource to create (Required).

400.description: 1. { 400: UserName already exists. }2. { 400: Email Address is not valid. }3. { 400: Location Group {OGId} not found or user does not have access to it }4. { 400: LocationGroupId {OGId} is not valid }5. { 400: UserName cannot be null or empty. }6. { 400: User Not Found in Directory }7. { 400: Admin User should be associated with atleast one role, please add role to the user. }8. { 400: The TimeZone value : {TimeZoneId} is invalid. }9. { 400: Invalid Locale name. }10. { 400: Duplicate role mapping is found between Location Group id {OGId} and Role id {RoleId} }

get.summary: New - Retrieves information about the specified admin user.
get.description: Performs necessary checks and get all the information of the Admin based on admin udid.

400.description: 1. { 400: User not found or does not have access to retrieve the details }2. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

put.summary: New - Updates the specified admin user.
put.description: Performs necessary checks and Update the Admin properties based on Id.

400.description: 1. { 400: User not found or does not have access to retrieve the details }1. { 400: UserName already exists. }2. { 400: Email Address is not valid. }3. { 400: Location Group {OGId} not found or user does not have access to it }4. { 400: LocationGroupId {OGId} is not valid }5. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

delete.summary: New - Deletes the specified admin user.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Admin user UUID to be deleted(Required).

400.description: 1. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

get.summary: New - Searches for Admin users using the query information provided.
get.description: Performs necessary checks and search for the admin users based on the request query.

parameters.name: firstname
parameters.description: The First name to search for.

parameters.name: lastname
parameters.description: The Last name to search for.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The Email Address to search for.

parameters.name: organizationgroupid
parameters.description: The Organization Group Id to search for.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The Role name to search for.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The User name to search for.

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Order the results by this attribute.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The specific page number to get.

parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Sorting order. Allowed values are ASC or DESC. Defaults to ASC if this attribute is not specified.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The admin status. Allowed values are Active or Inactive. Defaults to all, if this attribute is not specified.

parameters.name: onlydirectroleassignment
parameters.description: Indicates if only the administrators direct role assignments should be returned. Allowed values are true and false. Defaults to false, if this attribute is not specified.

parameters.name: fetchdirectoryadmins
parameters.description: Indicates if only directory admins will be fetched or both directory and basic will be fetched. Allowed values are true and false. Defaults to false, if this attribute is ot specified.

400.description: 1. { 400: Resource's organization group :{OGId} not found or user does not have access to this organization group. }

put.summary: New - Changes the specified admin user's password.
put.description: Performs necessary checks and update the password for an existing admin.

400.description: 1. { 400: User not found or does not have access to retrieve the details }2. { 400: Password cannot be null, empty, or whitespace }3. { 400: Password does not meet complexity requirements }4. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

401.description: 1. { 401: LDAP / AD users passwords cannot be changed }

put.summary: New - Adds a role to the specified admin user.
put.description: Performs necessary checks and add an role for an existing admin.

400.description: 1. { 400: User not found or does not have access to retrieve the details }2. { 400: Role {RoleId} not found or user does not have access to it }3. { 400: Location Group {OGId} not found or user does not have access to it }4. { 400: Admin user already has this role. 5. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

delete.summary: New - Removes a role from the specified admin user.
delete.description: Performs necessary checks and remove an role from an existing admin.

400.description: 1. { 400: User not found or does not have access to retrieve the details }2. { 400: Role {RoleId} not found or user does not have access to it }3. { 400: Location Group {OGId} not found or user does not have access to it }4. { 400: Role cannot be removed 5. {400: Role cannot be removed, atleast one role should be associated with the admin user {AdminId} }6. { 400: Requested 'admin' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }7. { 400: Requested 'admin role' was not found or user is not authorized to access it. }

get.summary: New - Gets LDAP sync job details. Allows admins to preview the changes to enrollment user attributes.
get.description: Preview details of the advanced LDAP sync job including the job status, enrollment user attributes etc.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The unique id of the created advanced ldap sync job.(Required).

parameters.name: search_text
parameters.description: Filters records based on the search text.

parameters.name: sort_column
parameters.description: Column based on which we can provide the sorting. Default JOB_ID.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: The order based which on we can sort. Default value is ASC.

400.description: Bad Request 1.{ 6: Sort Column is invalid. }

404.description: Not Found 1.{ 6301: Advanced LDAP Sync Job does not exist.}

422.description: UnProcessable Entity 1.{ 6304: The job is not in Pending Approval status and no preview data is available.} 2.{ 6312: The job has timed out as status has not changed for more than 24 hours.}

get.summary: New - Gets Enrollment user details for a particular Organization group.
get.description: Search the details of all the enrollment users for the provided user name for a particular OG.

parameters.name: oguuid
parameters.description: The unique id of the organization group.(Required).

400.description: Bad Request 1.{ 6320: Enrollment Users not found}

404.description: NotFound 1.{ 6008: No organization group found for the given Organization Group UUID : {0} }

get.summary: New - Gets the APNs configuration for an Organization Group
get.description: It fetches the configuration for APNs certificate Blob(.pem) uploaded to Workspace ONE UEM

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the organization group(Required)

400.description: 1. {6019: Organization Group with id : {id} not found or Admin user does not have access to it.} 2. {6013: No APNs certificates were found on the group}

404.description: 1. {6008: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID.}

get.summary: New - Gets Enrollment Restriction Policies accessible to admin
get.description: Fetch Enrollment Restriction Policies accessible to admin. We only return the following properties- name, uuid, organization group uuid

404.description: Not Found. {6185: No enrollment restriction policy found for the organization group.}

get.summary: New - Gets Enrollment Restriction Policy details based on uuid.
get.description: Fetch details for an Enrollment Restriction policy which includes name, uuid, ogname and User group assignments

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Identifier of an enrollment restriction policy

404.description: Not Found. {6185: No enrollment restriction policy found for the organization group.}

patch.summary: New - Assigns a list of usergroups to Enrollment Restriction policy
patch.description: Assigns a list of usergroups to Enrollment Restriction policy

parameters.name: enrollmentRestrictionPolicyUuid
parameters.description: Identifier of an enrollment restriction policy(Required)

parameters.name: organizationGroupUuid
parameters.description: Identifier of an enrollment organization group(Required)

400.description: Bad Request 1.{6: Enrollment organization group: { } not found or user does not have access to the organization group. }

403.description: Forbidden 1.{1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {12: Enrollment restriction policy not found : { } }

get.summary: New - Get Group Acknowledgement
get.description: Gets the approval status for a group along with the access token and link to merge that group. This will also include the details of members added and removed from the group.

parameters.name: membershipStatus
parameters.description: Filter for Added and Removed Users - ('Add'/'Remove')

400.description: Bad Request

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {6186: Group not found for given UUID

post.description: Merges the user or admin group which are in 'MergePendingApproval' or 'MergeFailed' state.

400.description: Bad Request 1. { 6189 : This is not a directory user group. Try again with a directory user group.} 2. { 6052 : Invalid user or admin group. Try again with a valid user group UUID.} 3. { 6190 : Invalid access token.Please try again with a valid access token. Access token will be generated when a user or admin group is synced and has changes that need to be merged.} 4. { 6191 : User or Admin group not in Pending Approval State}

403.description: Forbidden 1. { 1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation. }

404.description: Not Found 1. { 6192: Admin does not have access to user or admin group. }

get.summary: New - Loads LDAP configuration based on organization group UUID.
get.description: Gets LDAP configuration based on the organization group UUID.

parameters.name: organizationGroupUuid
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the organization group.(Required)

403.description: Forbidden 1. {6044: Admin is not authorized to access the OrganizationGroup.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {6008: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID.} 2. {6064: LDAP configuration does not exist for this organization group UUID.}

parameters.name: locationGroup
parameters.description: The OrganizationGroup resource to be created.

400.description: 1. {6 : Invalid Input - cannot create organization group with invalid input}

403.description: 1. {5093 : Admin Is Not Authorized - Admin does not have permission to create Partner type Organization Group. }, 2. {5093 : Admin Is Not Authorized - Admin does not have permission to create Customer type Organization Group. }

get.summary: Searches for organization groups using the query information provided.
get.description: Search organization by the given parameter.

parameters.name: groupid
parameters.description: The organization group identifier[Activation code] to search for.[Exact match is performed for this attribute].

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description: Orders the results based on this attribute-value[Valid values are: Id/Name/GroupId/LocationGroupType].

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specific page number to get. 0 based index.

parameters.name: sortorder
parameters.description: Sorting order. Allowed values are ASC or DESC. Defaults to ASC if this attribute is not specified.

get.summary: New - Retrieves information about the specified organization group.
get.description: Retrieves organization group by UUID. If Organization goup is not found, it will throw 404 error.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Identifier for an organization group on which operation is to be executed.(Required)

404.description: NotFound 1. {6008: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID.}

put.summary: New - Updates the metadata of the specified organization group.
put.description: Update the metadata of organization group specified by UUID. It return bad request if organization group name too long or group id too long.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Identifier for an organization group on which operation is to be executed.(Required)

400.description: BadRequest 1. {6: Invalid group name length} 2. {6: OrganizationGroup name has one or more restricted characters} 3. {6: Group ID exceed max size} 4. {6: Group ID has invalid characters} 5. {6: Global Organization group cannot be duplicated} 6. {6: Organization group name cannot be empty.} 7. {6: Organization group type cannot be empty.} 8. {6: Group ID cannot be empty.} 9. {6: Organization Group type update to Partner and Customer is not allowed.}

403.description: Forbidden 1.{5094: Admin is not authorized to edit customer code}

422.description: Unprocessable Entity 1. {6293 : Invalid Organization Group Timezone Code. } 2. {6309 : Invalid Organization Group Customer Industry type. }

delete.summary: New - Deletes the specified organization group.
delete.description: Delete organization group by given UUID. It return Forbidden if user want to delete current organization group. It returns bad request,if organization group cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Identifier for an organization group on which operation is to be executed.(Required)

403.description: Forbidden 1. {6019: Organization Group with id : {0} not found or Admin user does not have access to it.}

404.description: NotFound 1. {6008: No organization group found for the given organization group UUID.}

422.description: Unprocessable Entity 1. {200009: Organization group cannot be deleted as it has existing {0} conditional access configurations.} 2. {200035: Organization group cannot be deleted as it has existing {0} enrollment users.} 3. {7160: Existing Access Configuration can't be removed as Omnissa Identity Service (OIS) is enabled.

get.summary: New - Get a group list
get.description: Get the group list

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The filter string used to request a subset of resources.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: A comma separated list of strings indicating the names of resource attributes to return in the response.

parameters.name: excludedAttributes
parameters.description: A comma separated list of strings indicating the names of resource attributes to be removed from the default set of attributes to return.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: A string indicating the attribute to be used to order the returned responses.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: A string indicating the order in which the 'sortBy' parameter is applied.

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: A 1-based integer indicating the index of the first query result.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: An integer indicating the maximum number of query results per page.

403.description: Permissions denied

404.description: Not found

post.description:
Endpoint to create a group. As of now, we only support importing user groups from  a directory service into Workspace One UEM. 
When importing a user group form directory service, one needs to pass externalId. 
In case of a directory custom group, its required to pass displayName for the group.

400.description: User Groups cannot be created outside of Customer or Partner Organization Group hierarchy.

403.description: Permissions denied

404.description: Not found

get.description: Get the enrollment/admin group details by UUID

403.description: Permissions denied

404.description: Not found

patch.description: Operations on groups. Currently we support patch operation only on LastSyncOn. Sync will be performed only when the LastSyncOn is passed as mm/dd/yyyy

404.description: not found

parameters.name: searchRequest
parameters.description: The search criteria to returned responses.(Required)

get.summary: New - Retrieves the tenant storage configuration details.
get.description: Retrieves the configuration settings for the Workspace ONE UEM to tenant storage configuration.

get.summary: New - Search for enrollment users based on Search Text.
get.description: Retrieves a collection of enrollment users for a given location group and search text for add device.

403.description: Forbidden 1.{1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {6183 : Resource's organization group :{organization_group_uuid} not found or user does not have access to this organization group.}

post.description: Create an enrollment user with attributes including externalId, userName, password, firstName, lastName, displayName, userPrincipalName, emailAddress, phoneNumber, mobileNumber, messageType, messageTemplateUuid, enrollmentRoleUuid, status, securityType, deviceStagingEnabled, deviceStagingType, organizationGroupUuid, enrollmentOrganizationGroupUuid, aadMappingAttribute, department, employeeIdentifier, costCenter, customAttribute1, customAttribute2, customAttribute3, customAttribute4 and customAttribute5. <br/><br/>UsersV2 API support syncing of users into the Workspace ONE Access from Workspace ONE UEM.

400.description: Bad Request 1. {6: Resource's organization group :{ } not found or user does not have access to this organization group. } 2. {5081: { } authentication is not enabled at organization group: { }. } 3. {5086: Directory service is not configured for organization group { }.} 4. {5087: Unable to create a directory enrollment user when LDAP type is none and SAML is disabled at organization group { }. } 5. {5088: The directory enrollment user { } is required with LDAP type is none and SAML is enabled at organization group { }. } 6. {400: User not found in Directory. } 7. {5066: Error occurred during password enforcement: { }. } 8. {5082: Enrollment user { } exists at organization group { }. } 9. {5083: Enrollment role { } is not valid. } 10. {5084: Default enrollment role is not found at organization group: { }. } 11. {5085: Enrollment message template: { } is not valid. } 12. {200028: Users cannot be created outside of Customer or Partner Organization Group hierarchy.}

403.description: Forbidden 1.{1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

422.description: 1012 - Unprocessable Entity 1. {SecurityType: SecurityType is not valid. Available options are basic, directory and authenticationProxy.} 2. {Password: Password is required for the { } enrollment user.} 3. {Password: Password cannot be greater than 128 characters.} 4. {FirstName: FirstName is required for the { } enrollment user.} 5. {LastName: LastName is required for the { } enrollment user.} 6. {EmailAddress: EmailAddress is required for the { } enrollment user.} 7. {EmailAddress: EmailAddress is not valid.} 8. {MessageType: MessageType is not valid. Available options are None, Email and SMS.} 9. {MobileNumber: MobileNumber is required for SMS notification.} 10. {MobileNumber: MobileNumber is not valid.} 11. {PhoneNumber: PhoneNumber is not valid.} 12. {DeviceStagingType: DeviceStagingType is not valid. Available options are StagingDisabled, SingleUserStagingStandard, SingleUserStagingAdvanced, MultipleUserStaging, MultipleUserStagingSingleUserStandard and MultipleUserStagingSingleUserAdvanced.} 13. {DeviceStagingType: Invalid staging user details. Enable for device staging with the valid device staging type.}

get.summary: New - Read an enrollment user by UUID
get.description:
Read an enrollment user attributes including uuid, externalId, domain, userName, firstName, lastName,
displayName, fullName, userPrincipalName, emailAddress, phoneNumber, mobileNumber, emailUserName,
messageType, messageTemplateUuid, enrollmentRoleUuid, status, securityType, deviceStagingType,
enrolledDeviceCount, removableDriveCount, userGroupCount, organizationGroupUuid,
enrollmentOrganizationGroupUuid, aadMappingAttribute, department, employeeIdentifier, costCenter,
customAttribute1, customAttribute2, customAttribute3, customAttribute4, customAttribute5,
createdDate, createdBy, lastModifiedDate, lastModifiedBy, lastActionSource and lastActionType.

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {12: Enrollment User not found : { } }

put.summary: New - Update an enrollment user by UUID
put.description: Update the enrollment user with attributes including password, firstName, lastName, displayName, emailAddress, phoneNumber, mobileNumber, messageType, messageTemplateUuid, deviceStagingEnabled, deviceStagingType,  enrollmentRoleUuid, enrollmentOrganizationGroupUuid, aadMappingAttribute, department, employeeIdentifier, costCenter, customAttribute1, customAttribute2, customAttribute3, customAttribute4 and customAttribute5. <br/><br/>UsersV2 API support syncing of users into the Workspace ONE Access from Workspace ONE UEM.

400.description: Bad Request 1. {5066: Error occurred during password enforcement: { }. } 2. {6: Enrollment organization group: { } not found or user does not have access to the organization group. }

403.description: Forbidden 1.{1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found  1. {12: Enrollment User not found : { } }

422.description: 1012 - Unprocessable Entity 1. {EmailAddress: EmailAddress is not valid.} 2. {PhoneNumber: PhoneNumber is not valid.} 3. {MobileNumber: MobileNumber is required for SMS notification.} 4. {MobileNumber: MobileNumber is not valid.} 5. {EnrollmentOrganizationGroupUuid: EnrollmentOrganizationGroupUuid has to be a guid value.} 6. {EnrollmentRoleUuid: EnrollmentRoleUuid has to be a guid value.} 7. {MessageType: MessageType is not valid. Available options are None, Email and SMS.} 8. {MessageTemplateUuid: MessageTemplateUuid has to be a guid value.} 9. {Password: Password cannot be greater than 128 characters.} 10. {DeviceStagingType: Invalid staging user details. Enable for device staging with the valid device staging type.}

delete.summary: New - Delete an enrollment user by UUID
delete.description: Delete an enrollment user by UUID. <br/><br/>UsersV2 API support syncing of users into the Workspace ONE Access from Workspace ONE UEM.

400.description: Bad Request 1. {9. User has enrolled devices, cant be deleted.} 2. {6198. User is associated to an Apple Business Manager or Apple School Manager registration record or profile. It cannot be deleted. Please remove the association and try again.} 3. {7148. User is associated as a staging user to some devices. It cannot be deleted. Please remove the association and try again.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {2: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {12: Enrollment User not found : { } }

username.description: Gets or sets name of the admin user.

password.description: Gets or sets password of the admin user.

firstName.description: Gets or sets firstName of the admin user.

lastName.description: Gets or sets lastName of the admin user.

email.description: Gets or sets email address of the admin user.

initialLandingPage.description: Gets or sets initial landing page of AirWatch console.

isActiveDirectoryUser.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether flag to indicate whether the admin user is LDAP/AD user.

requiresPasswordChange.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether flag to indicate whether the admin user requires to change the password on next login.

roles.description: Gets or sets roles associated with the admin user.

messageTemplateId.description: Gets or sets message template ID.

messageTemplateUuid.description: Gets or sets message template UUID.

organizationGroupId.description: Gets or sets organization group ID.

organizationGroupUuid.description: Gets or sets organization group UUID.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

organizationGroupId.description: Gets or sets organization group ID.

organizationGroupUuid.description: Gets or sets organization group UUID.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

errorCode.description: Gets or sets application error code.

message.description: Gets or sets friendly error message.

activityId.description: Gets or sets transactionId of the request.

links.description: Gets or sets list of hypermedia link.

Href.description: Gets or sets hyper text reference.

Title.description: Gets or sets title of the link.

PartialContentRange.description: Gets or sets partial content range.

FileName.description: Gets or sets FileName {Will be set in the content-disposition header}.

AcceptsByteRanges.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets a value which indicates whether a range byte request for a stream is accepted or not.

SendETagHeaderValue.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the option to include ETagHeaderValue.

ResponseDateTimeFormat.description: Gets or sets dateTime format for response.

IRequestQuery.description:
Interface for IAwRequestQuery
This will hold all the required data for a request and will be filled from ModelBinder.

QueryParams.description: Gets or sets Query Parameters. For e.g. any query string parameters will be extracted to key,value pair and stored here.

TenantContext.description: Gets or sets IAwTenantContext. Will hold the tenant details, which will be filled as part of the tenant validation handler.

RequestMethod.description: Gets or sets RequestMethod. Will be used to write custom rules.

AllowedUriQueryChars.description: Gets or sets allowed Characters in Query String.

ITenantContext.description: Contract for TenantContext. Will be exposed from RequestQuery and will be injected to every controller actions and Business method.

TenantCode.description: Gets or sets TenantCode. Uniquely identify the tenant for the request.

OrganizationgroupId.description: Gets or sets Organization Group ID.

AdminV2ResponseModel.description: Represents an admin user V2 response model.

organizationGroupName.description: Gets or sets the organization group name of the admin user.

timeZoneIdentifier.description: Gets or sets the IANA time zone identifier of the admin user.

lastLoginTimeStamp.description:
Gets or sets the last login timestamp of the admin user.
Null if the admin has never logged in.

externalId.description: Gets or sets the external identifier for the admin user (e.g. directory or CSP UUID).

createdDate.description: Gets or sets the created on date for the user.

createdBy.description: Gets or sets the username of the user who created this admin user.

lastModifiedDate.description: Gets or sets the modified on date for the user.

lastModifiedBy.description: Gets or sets the username of the user who modified this admin user.

lastActionSource.description: Gets or sets the action source name which triggered the action type.

lastActionType.description: Gets or sets the action type name which updated the user.

password_expiration.description:
Gets or sets password expiration information for the admin user.
Only applicable to basic (non-directory) admins who are not SCIM/OIS provisioned.

messageTemplateId.description: Gets or sets message template ID.

password.description: Gets or sets password of the admin user.

username.description: Gets or sets name of the admin user.

firstName.description: Gets or sets firstName of the admin user.

lastName.description: Gets or sets lastName of the admin user.

email.description: Gets or sets email address of the admin user.

initialLandingPage.description: Gets or sets initial landing page of AirWatch console.

isActiveDirectoryUser.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether flag to indicate whether the admin user is LDAP/AD user.

requiresPasswordChange.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether flag to indicate whether the admin user requires to change the password on next login.

roles.description: Gets or sets roles associated with the admin user.

messageTemplateUuid.description: Gets or sets message template UUID.

organizationGroupId.description: Gets or sets organization group ID.

organizationGroupUuid.description: Gets or sets organization group UUID.

Enrollment.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered to set the enrollment status of a device.

UnenrolledEnterpriseWipe.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered to unenroll and perform an enterprise wipe on a device.

Wipe.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered to wipe a device.

CompromisedStatusChange.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a change in the setting of a compromised device.

Delete.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a deletion of the device.

ComplianceStatusChange.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has changed the compliance status for a device.

CheckOutCheckIn.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for device checked in and checked out by user.

DeviceAttributes.description: Gets or sets device attribute properties that have been changed. These properties are triggered by an outbound event call.

AssetNumber.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a device asset number.

FriendlyName.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a device friendly name.

OrganizationGroup.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has triggered a changed organization group for a device.

UserEmailAddress.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a existing user email address.

Ownership.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for ownership of a device.

OperatingSystem.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a device's operating system.

PhoneNumber.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a device's phone number.

DeviceMCC.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether an outbound event has been triggered for a device's MCC.

LdapConfigV2Model.description: Contains all the settings related to a configuration.

uuid.description: Unique identifier of the LDAP configuration.

managed_by_organization_group_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the organization group where LDAP is configured.

is_inherited.description: It indicates whether the settings are inherited from higher organization group or not for the given LDAP configuration.

ServerConfigV2Model.description: Contains the basic information of the Ldap Server.

ldap_server_type.description: Type of LDAP Server. By default it is ActiveDirectory.

ldap_server.description: Host name of the LDAP server.

port.description: Indicates the TCP port used to communicate with the directory server. By default the Encryption Type is set to 'None' with the port set to 389.

verify_ssl_certificate.description: Determines whether the SSL Certificate should be verified.

protocol_version.description: Version of the LDAP protocol in use. The most commonly used value is '3'.

use_service_account_credentials.description: Determines whether the credentials from the App pool of the server that connects to the directory server should be used.

authentication_type.description: Indicates the Bind Authentication Type used by the AirWatch server to communicate with the directory server.

authentication_username.description: Indicates the Authentication Username used for LDAP binding. This is a required property except when "authentication_type" is "Anonymous" or when "use_service_account_credentials" is enabled.

ldap_definition_domain_mappings.description: Indicates list of LDAP definition domain mappings model entity.

allow_trust_between_domains.description: Determines whether the bind user name will be allowed to bind across all domains.

search_subdomains.description: Determines whether subdomains should be searched.

connection_timeout.description: Connection Timeout in seconds. Valid input range for this property is 30 to 300. (Default value - 30).

request_timeout.description: Request Timeout in seconds.Valid input range for this property is 120 to 300. (Default value - 120).

use_null_base_dn_for_search.description: Determines whether Null BaseDn should be used for search.

use_recursive_oid_for_enrollment.description: Determines whether Recursive Oid should be used for Enrollment.

use_recursive_oid_for_group_sync.description: Determines whether Recursive Oid should be used for Group Sync.

is_sort_control_supported.description: Determines whether sort control should be supported.

enable_dns_srv.description: Determines whether DNS resource record should be enabled to locate Domain Controller in AD.

identity_services_id.description: Identity Services ID when AirWatch Identity Service is enabled.

UserConfigV2Model.description: Contains the basic information of the user configuration.

object_class.description: It represents LDAP User Object Class. A component which defines the "type" for an User object in the schema.

auto_merge.description: Determines whether the attributes for a user should be automatically merged.

auto_sync_user_status.description: Determines whether the user will be automatically activated or deactivated in Workspace One UEM, when activated or deactivated in Directory.

disabled_status.description: This property is used to determine the value that should be considered to represent the disabled status of a user in Directory. It is used in conjunction with "disabled_status_attribute_type" property.

disabled_status_attribute_type.description: This property represents the type of value passed in the "disabled_status" property. Possible values -> FlagBitMatch, ValueExactMatch.

enable_custom_attributes.description: Determines whether Custom Attributes should be enabled and synced.

GroupConfigV2Model.description: Contains the basic information of the group configuration.

object_class.description: It represents LDAP Group Object Class. A component which defines the "type" for a Group object in the schema.

organizational_unit_object_class.description: It represents Organizational Unit Object Class. A container within a domain which can hold user, groups, computer and other organizational units.

auto_sync.description: Determines whether users should be automatically added/removed in User Groups based on membership in LDAP/AD.

auto_merge.description: Determines whether sync changes should automatically be applied without administrative approval.

enable_conditional_group_sync.description: Determines whether conditional group sync should be enabled.

update_friendly_name.description: Determines whether the Friendly Name should be updated.

SamlDefinitionV2Model.description: Contains all the settings related to a SAML definition configuration.

service_provider_id.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the service provider.

identity_provider_id.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the identity provider.

request_binding_type.description: Gets or sets the type of the request binding.

idp_sso_url_redirect.description: Gets or sets the IDP sso URL redirect.

idp_sso_url_post.description: Gets or sets the IDP sso URL post.

idp_sso_url_artifact.description: Gets or sets the IDP sso URL artifact.

name_id_format.description: Gets or sets the name identifier format.

authentication_request_security.description: Gets or sets the authentication request security.

response_binding_type.description: Gets or sets the type of the response binding.

idp_artifact_resolution_url.description: Gets or sets URL of the IDP artifact resolution.

ignore_ssl_errors.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the ignore ssl errors.

authentication_response_security.description: Gets or sets the authentication response security.

idp_logout_url.description: Gets or sets URL of the IDP logout.

idp_certificate.description: Gets or sets the IDP certificate.

service_provider_certificate.description: Gets or sets the service provider certificate.

is_new_saml_enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the new saml is enabled.

is_vidm_selected.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this object is vidm selected.

enable_saml_for_type.description:
Gets or sets bitwise ORed value is saved in this field for Admin -> 1 Enrollment -> 2 Self-
Service Portal -> 4.

allowed_clock_skew.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating time in minutes that is configurable to handle clock skew
time for SAML assertion validations.

IdentityProviderV2Model.description: Contains all the settings related to an identity provider configuration.

location_group.description: Gets or sets location group where the given AAD is defined.

directory_id.description: Gets or sets unique Identifier of the tenant in Azure Active Directory.

use_azure_active_directory.description: Indicates if Azure Active Directory integration is enabled at this OG.

aad_mapping_attribute.description: Mapping attribute between AAD object and directory user/group (AadMappingAttribute).

aad_object_identifier_data_type.description: Data type of the AAD object identifier attribute.

revoke_azure_ad_user_tokens_on_device_wi.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether bool flag to indicate the value of the console setting to trigger azure AD user token revocation on wipe.

is_android_shared_device_checkout.description: Indicates if Android shared device checkout (MSAL SSO) is configured.

is_windows_oob_enrollment.description: Indicates if Windows OOBE enrollment applicable (derived from tenant name when global SSO feature flag enabled).

enrollment_url.description: Enrollment URL for discovery / user facing flows.

tenant_name.description: Gets or sets tenantName for the Azure Active Directory.

customer_code.description: Gets or sets customer code of the OG where the given AAD is defined.

client_id.description: Gets or sets unique Identifier used by the application to identify itself with Azure Active Directory.

auth_string.description: Gets or sets the login Authentication URL for AAD Tenant.

resource_url.description: Gets or sets to authenticate to the services, the client needs to know the resource url.

hosted.description: Gets or sets indicates where the Identity Provider is hosted for the associated tenant.

LdapDomainMappingV1Model.description: Contains the basic information of the Domain Mapping.

ldap_server_name.description: Host name of the LDAP server.

LdapAttributeV1Model.description: Contains the basic information of the LDAP mapping attribute.

internal_attribute_name.description: Internal Attribute Name. It represents a specific attribute in AirWatch that gets mapped to the external attribute in the LDAP Directory.

external_name.description: External Attribute Name. This is the attribute in the LDAP Directory which is associated with "internal_attribute_name" property of AirWatch.

InternalName.description: Gets or sets The location Internal name.

DisplayName.description: Gets or sets The location display name.

LocationType.description: Gets or sets Location Type id like 17[Field], 16[Corporate office] etc..

IsActive.description: Gets or sets Value is true if location is active else false.

Status.description: Gets or sets Status id of location like 100[Complete], 80[Installed].

Timezone.description: Gets or sets Timezone id of Location like 62[EST, GMT-5.00] etc..

PrimaryLocationGroupId.description: Gets or sets Primary location group of location.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

Name.description: Gets or sets location group name.

GroupId.description: Gets or sets the location group's tenant code.

LocationGroupType.description: Gets or sets location group type like Business segment, Customer etc...

Country.description: Gets or sets country name like United States, India etc.

Locale.description: Gets or sets Locale information for Location Group like.

AddDefaultLocation.description: Gets or sets this tells whether default location to be created while creating Location Group.

CreatedOn.description: Gets or sets date and time when Location group was created.

Users.description: Gets or sets this contains total number of Enrollment users in this Location Group.

Admins.description: Gets or sets this contains total number of Admin users in this Location Group.

Devices.description: Gets or sets this contains total nummber of devices in this Location group.

EnableRestApiAccess.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this is a value indicating whether enable rest api access.

location.description: Gets or sets location details of a locationgroup.

Timezone.description: Gets or sets Timezone id of Location like 62[EST, GMT-5.00] etc..

timezone_code.description: Gets or sets Organization group timezone code.

customer_industry_type.description: Gets or sets Organization Group Customer industry type.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

Status.description: Gets or sets the rest api status.

DefaultAdminApiKey.description: Gets or sets the default admin api key.

EnrollmentUserApiKey.description: Gets or sets the enrollment user api key.

Uuid.description: Gets or sets the location group guid value.

RestApiAccess.description: Gets or sets the rest api status.

OrganizationGroups.description: Gets or sets the Organization Groups.

AdditionalInfo.description: Gets or sets Hypermedia content for the result.

GroupListResponse.description: Response for a list of groups.

schemas.description: Schemas used to compose a group list response.

totalResults.description: The total number of results returned by the list or query operation.

startIndex.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current list of groups.

externalId.description:
An identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.  
The "externalId" may simplify identification of a resource between the provisioning client 
and the service provider by allowing the client to use a filter to locate the resource with 
an identifier from the provisioning domain, obviating the need to store a local mapping 
between the provisioning domain's identifier of the resource and the identifier used by the 
service provider.  Each resource MAY include a non-empty "externalId" value.

schemas.description: Schemas used to compose a group entity.

members.description: A list of users that belong to the group.

createGroupAtOrganizationGroup.description: The organization group uuid where the group needs to be created.

organizationGroupAssignment.description:
This assignment takes effect only when 'Automatically Select Based on User Group' is selected as the Group ID 
Assignment Mode in All Settings > Devices > Users > General > Enrollment > Grouping

distinguishedName.description: Distinguished name of the group as found in directory service. This attribute is not required if externalType is CustomQuery.

baseDN.description: The point from which a server will search for groups.

directoryDomain.description: Directory domain where the group search needs to be done.

customLogic.description: Additional query used to search for directory entity. This attribute MUST only be passed when directoryGroupType is set to CustomQuery.

autoSync.description: If enabled, the scheduler will automatically sync with LDAP and collect all group changes. If not passed, will apply internally configured value.

autoMerge.description: If enabled, the scheduler will automatically merge changes into Workspace One UEM. If not passed, will apply internally configured value.

maximumAllowableChanges.description:
The scheduler needs Admin approval if the changes exceed this amount. This attribute MUST be passed only if AutoMerge enabled. 
If not passed, will apply internally configured value. The value should be between 1 and 99999.

addGroupMembersAutomatically.description: If enabled, will add missing users automatically to the group. If not passed, will apply internally configured value.

sendEmailToUsersWhenAddingMissingUsers.description:
If enabled, will send emails to users while adding missing users automatically to the group. 
This attribute MUST be sent only if addGroupMembersAutomatically is enabled. If not passed, will apply internally configured value.

messageTemplateName.description:
The name of the message template that would be used to send emails to users while adding missing users automatically to the group. 
This attribute MUST be sent only if sendEmailToUsersWhenAddingMissingUsers is enabled.

allowAllAdministratorsToManageThisUserGr.description: If enabled, will allow all administrators to manage this user group. If not passed, will apply internally configured value.

defaultEnrollmentRoleName.description: The name of the default role to which the enrollment users of the group would have access to.

Metadata.description: A complex attribute containing resource metadata.

created.description: The "DateTime" that the resource was added to the service provider.

lastModified.description: The most recent DateTime that the details of this resource were updated at the service provider.  If this resource has never been modified since its initial creation, the value MUST be the same as the value of "created".

location.description: The URI of the resource being returned.

resourceType.description: The name of the resource type of the resource.

version.description: The version of the resource being returned.

CreateGroupRequest.description: Describes attributes required to create a group.

schemas.description: Schemas of the group to be created.

externalId.description:
An identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.  The "externalId" may simplify identification of a 
resource between the provisioning client and the service provider by allowing the client to use a filter to locate the 
resource with an identifier from the provisioning domain, obviating the need to store a local mapping between the provisioning 
domain's identifier of the resource and the identifier used by the service provider.  Each resource MAY include a non-empty "externalId" value.

schemas.description: Schemas used to compose a group patch request.

PatchOperation.description: Patch operation indicating the operation type and the attribute path

op.description: Operation to be performed on a property specified by 'path'

path.description: Path to the property for patch operation

value.description: corresponding 'value' of that field specified by 'path'

schemas.description: Schemas used to compose a search request.

attributes.description: A multi-valued list of strings indicating the names of resource attributes to return in the response.

excludedAttributes.description: A multi-valued list of strings indicating the names of resource attributes to be removed from the default set of attributes to return.

filter.description: The filter string used to request a subset of resources.

sortBy.description: A string indicating the attribute to be used to order the returned responses.

sortOrder.description: A string indicating the order in which the 'sortBy' parameter is applied.

startIndex.description: A 1-based integer indicating the index of the first query result.

count.description: An integer indicating the maximum number of query results per page.

ServiceProviderConfig.description: Defines all the configuration properties available at the service provider.

BulkFeature.description: A complex type that specifies bulk configuration options.

maxOperations.description: An integer value specifying the maximum number of operations.

maxPayloadSize.description: An integer value specifying the maximum payload size in bytes.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

ChangePasswordFeature.description: A complex type that specifies configuration options related to changing a password.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

ETagFeature.description: A complex type that specifies ETag configuration options.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

FilterFeature.description: A complex type that specifies FILTER options.

maxResults.description: An integer value specifying the maximum number of resources returned in a response.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

PatchFeature.description: A complex type that specifies PATCH configuration options.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

SortFeature.description: A complex type that specifies Sort configuration options.

supported.description: A Boolean value specifying whether or not the operation is supported.

externalId.description:
An identifier for the resource as defined by the provisioning client.  
The "externalId" may simplify identification of a resource between the 
provisioning client and the service provider by allowing the client to 
use a filter to locate the resource with an identifier from the provisioning 
domain, obviating the need to store a local mapping between the provisioning 
domain's identifier of the resource and the identifier used by the service provider.
Each resource MAY include a non-empty "externalId" value.

userName.description:
Unique identifier for the user, used by the user to directly authenticate. 
Often displayed to the user as their unique identifier within the system 
(as opposed to "id" or "externalId", which are generally opaque and not user-friendly 
identifiers).  Each User MUST include a non-empty userName value.  This identifier MUST 
be unique across entire set of Users.  This attribute is REQUIRED and is case insensitive.

schemas.description: Schemas used to compose a user entity

groups.description:
A list of groups to which the user belongs, either through direct membership, through 
nested groups, or dynamically calculated.

createdBy.description: Gets or sets the user who created this resource.

lastModifiedBy.description: Gets or sets the user who last modified this resource.

lastActionSource.description: Gets or sets the action source for the last operation on this resource.

lastActionType.description: Gets or sets the action type for the last operation on this resource.

TenantStorageSettingsV2ResponseModel.description: Specifies the Tenant storage configuration properties.

application_capacity_mb.description: The application capacity in tenant storage(MB).
